assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Check for PDB blocking drain (most common cause)' and 'If PDBs are blocking (90% of cases)'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get pdb -A -o wide' command which checks PDBs across all namespaces

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes commands to check for Terminating/Pending pods, events for evicted pods, and bare pods that can't be rescheduled

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Provides commands to check for FailedScheduling events and 'kubectl top nodes' to diagnose resource constraints

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Shows kubectl patch command to temporarily modify PDB with maxUnavailable: '50%'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout or automatic force-drain behavior after 1 hour

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud commands to adjust max-surge-upgrade and max-unavailable-upgrade settings as both a fix and prevention measure

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Does not mention admission webhooks or validating/mutating webhooks as a potential cause of stuck drains

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Provides monitoring commands under 'Monitor Progress After Fix' section to watch node upgrades and check for stuck pods

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE disruption-event notifications, POD_PDB_VIOLATION events, or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub integration
